subject: docs(security): add Mapbox token URL restriction steps to USER_ACTIONS
body:
Public Mapbox token is exposed in client JS bundle — URL restrictions
in the Mapbox dashboard prevent the token from being usable on
unauthorized domains.

Tags: security, documentation, mapbox
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch
